name: Spring Gala 2026 — Venue & Logistics
notes: Pinnacle Peak Ballroom event planning. Paul comments; Linda coordinates.

name: Spring Gala 2026 — Catering & Vendors
notes: Menu review, caterer confirmation, A/V vendor coordination.

name: Spring Gala 2026 — Guest List & Invitations
notes: Donor invitations, RSVP tracking, table assignments.

name: School Tour Program — Spring 2026
notes: Tue/Thu school group scheduling. Calendly bookings coordinated through docent desk.

name: Docent Training & Volunteer Onboarding — 2026
notes: New volunteer orientation materials, exhibit briefing packets, and shift scheduling for Tue/Thu rotations.

name: Flight Simulator Exhibit — Maintenance Schedule
notes: Quarterly servicing of the 737 sim. Paul flags calibration issues; Frank coordinates the vendor.

name: B-17 Gallery Refresh — Winter 2026
notes: New placards and audio narration for the WWII bomber exhibit. Aligning content with the docent script.

name: Fall Member Appreciation Night 2025
notes: Closed event. After-action notes archived. Attendance 210; raised funds for the restoration shop.

name: Oral History Project — Veteran Aviators
notes: Recording interviews with retired military and airline pilots. Paul recommended several SkyBridge contacts.

name: Gift Shop Inventory & Vendor Review — 2026
notes: Reorder thresholds, new aviation-themed merchandise, and quarterly vendor pricing review.

name: Website & Booking System Migration
notes: Move tour bookings off the legacy form onto the new Calendly integration. Marcus leads the technical work.

name: Annual Fund Drive — Spring 2026
notes: Direct mail and email campaign to members. Goal $120k toward the restoration hangar.

name: Restoration Hangar — P-51 Mustang Project
notes: Multi-year restoration. Tracking parts sourcing, volunteer hours, and grant reporting.

name: Summer Camp Curriculum — Young Aviators
notes: Planning the July day-camp sessions. Paul drafting the cockpit-basics module for the older group.

name: Member Newsletter — Quarterly Production
notes: Q1 issue. Feature on the simulator exhibit and a profile of the new docent class.

name: Facilities — HVAC & Lighting Upgrade
notes: Replacing aging HVAC in the main hangar and upgrading gallery lighting to LED. Bids under review.

name: Grant Application — State Humanities Council
notes: Drafting the education-outreach grant due in October. Susan compiling program metrics.

name: Volunteer Recognition Luncheon — 2026
notes: Year-end appreciation luncheon planning. Awards for milestone service hours.

name: Cockpit Photo Archive — Digitization
notes: Scanning donated cockpit and route photographs. Cataloging by aircraft type and decade.

name: Security & Visitor Safety Review
notes: Annual walkthrough of emergency exits, signage, and crowd-flow for large events.
